config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically come before individual rights. When governments or communities are given too much power to override the individual, abuse becomes easier, and the weakest people usually suffer first. In my view, a healthy society protects both public order and personal freedom, instead of treating individual rights as secondary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, hak individu justru menjadi batas penting agar negara atau mayoritas tidak semena-mena atas nama “kebaikan bersama.” Saya setuju bahwa masyarakat punya kepentingan nyata, tetapi prioritas itu hanya sah jika pembatasan terhadap individu benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, slogan kepentingan sosial terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan terhadap orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I have seen how easily “the common good” can become a justification for silencing dissent, weakening minority protections, or letting authorities act without enough accountability. Society does need shared rules, but those rules are only legitimate if they protect people’s basic rights instead of treating individuals as disposable for the sake of order.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kita justru menunjukkan bahwa ketika mayoritas atau pemerintah diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama “kepentingan umum,” hak minoritas dan kebebasan sipil paling mudah dikorbankan. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi ia harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar yang tidak boleh diganggu kecuali dalam keadaan benar-benar perlu, sempit, dan dapat diaudit secara ketat. Kalau tidak, “kebaikan bersama” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alasan untuk menyalahgunakan kekuasaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not sit above individual rights as a general rule. In Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to “public order” or “the common good” can be used to pressure dissenters, marginalize minorities, and excuse weak accountability, so I do not trust that slogan when it is treated as a blank check. A society is stronger when it protects basic rights first and then uses collective interests to guide policy within those limits. If individual rights can be overridden too easily, then the people most at risk are usually the ones with the least power, not the ones making the rules.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak tegas gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, pengalaman politik kita menunjukkan bahwa ketika “kepentingan umum” diberi cek kosong, minoritas, pengkritik, dan orang yang tidak populer justru paling mudah dikorbankan. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus berjalan di dalam batas hak dasar yang jelas, sempit, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Kalau tidak, istilah itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan oleh mayoritas atau negara.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
